response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of software development experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with current full-stack work in TypeScript/Node.js at re:cinq including AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling — directly matching the JD's AI agent development requirement. Strong polyglot background (TypeScript, Java, C/C++, DLang, Python-adjacent), MongoDB/SQL, Docker, Kubernetes, and a track record of TDD/CI/CD craftsmanship. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js, Vitest, or React-at-scale evidence, and limited recent PostgreSQL exposure, but these are learnable given the demonstrated depth.
strengths: 13+ years full-stack across TS/Node, React, MongoDB, Docker/K8s with current AI-agent/MCP work
Polyglot proficiency (TypeScript, Java, C++, DLang) and strong architecture/testing discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based)
Proven delivery at scale (Dunnhumby micro-services, Optilyz pricing platform) plus founder-level ownership of GISCollective
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in the resume
React exposure mentioned but depth/recency unclear vs. heavy Node/DLang focus
Python listed only implicitly; PostgreSQL not called out (MongoDB/MySQL instead)

key_factors.factor: AI agent / MCP experience at re:cinq
Senior full-stack TS/Node tenure with architecture and TDD background
Missing explicit Nest.js and Vitest experience
